title: Fazbear's Playdate R
description: Turn the Playdate mod into FNAF!
body:
Note: this is NOT a standalone mod. This is a texture pack that changes models and textures for the mod playdate, which is not made by me.
Do not ask me for a 1.19+ port, I can't do that. Playdate is moving forwards without the horror aspect, and this resource pack is completely impossible without the horror aspect. Do not harass the people behind playdate, even though it is sad that this resource pack is stuck on 1.18.2 now.

VERY IMPORTANT: The 1.18.2 versions of playdate this pack can be can be applied to are not available on modrinth. They are available on that other source of mc mods, but I have moved this pack here because current events have made me want to move away from that source.

For best experience, use this with the datapack that changes the recipes: https://modrinth.com/datapack/fazbears-playdate-d

Fazbear's Playdate (resource pack) is a resource pack that changes the textures, models and animations of almost everything in the playdate mod.
This includes 5 animatronics, which can be infused with remnant to make them come to life at night. This pack also comes with many other blocks, such as party flags, party hats (cannot be worn), pizza wall decorations, and tons of plushies.

Note about diagonal party flags and star decorations: They are NOT placed diagonally by default. Their model was made so that when you place them diagonally, the decorations will connect. You can still place them normally, though they will clip through anything on the side of the block they're placed on.
